shape_decode: cmp=W, vp=L, vpc=W, naive=_ : cmplog and value_profile_cmplog resolve, value_profile blocks, naive non-decisive => i2s-pro literal family (the only technique delta between the winners {cmplog,vpc} and the loser {value_profile} is I2SRandReplace). Label-source = resolve pattern; G2 verification = cmplog-vs-naive corpus byte footprint, independent of the vpc/vp pattern.
round2_verdict: CONFIRM. Honest re-examination of the 4 unlabeled rule_not_met branches finds NO built tool that discriminates a genuinely-different mechanism. 3 are decidable:false by tool reach (variable-offset structural repeat / inequality-with-no-target-byte / variable-deep single-byte operand); 1 (curl_505) is an honest discriminating negative (fixed-offset but corpus-ambient literal). The frozen i2s_literal_operand_substitution hypothesis is carried forward verbatim and re-validates the 3 confirmed branches. No new hypothesis is added (per G1/G3).

round0_outcome_reviewed.note: Both servers scored their OWN targets through operand_enrichment (n_scorable=1, n_decidable=1 for every unlabeled branch in assignments_{s4,sB}.json). So the 4 failures are NOT an off-server / missing-corpus gap: the tool RAN on each gate and produced enrich < 1.0. The validated 3 all carry DISTINCTIVE literals rare in naive's corpus (port/HTTP token, ://authority, 'pHYs' FOURCC: naive_target_frac 0.051 / 0.044 / 0.001). The 4 failures each have a gate the tool's fixed-offset target-byte model cannot represent OR a literal that is corpus-ambient.

hypotheses.label: I2SRandReplace splices the exact logged comparand literal into a fixed head gate offset; VP's CMP_MAP Hamming gradient cannot reach the exact value within budget => cmplog corpus enriched in the target byte vs naive

params.scope: per W/L gate offset, log2(target_frac_cmplog / target_frac_naive) over the cmplog-vs-naive corpus; sign-preserving max-magnitude aggregation isolates the single most-differentiating (I2S operand) offset.
params.note: Rule and threshold UNCHANGED from round-0/round-1 (held FIXED across all rounds). They correctly discriminated 3 of 7 and sit inside the registry's validated separation band (pro median +3.12 / anti -0.55, 88% separation). Lowering the cutoff to capture the 4 failures would break that band and chase labels (G3); we do NOT touch it.

hypotheses.prediction: i2s-pro => signed_target_enrich >= 1.0 : the cmplog corpus carries the exact target literal byte at the fixed gate offset at a higher rate than naive, because I2SRandReplace plants the logged comparand there and VP/havoc cannot. A 'VP-gradient-was-sufficient' or 'literal-is-corpus-ambient' alternative predicts signed_target_enrich ~ 0 (no cmplog-vs-naive delta). The sign+magnitude discriminates. G2: this is a cmplog-vs-naive corpus byte-frequency comparison, fully independent of the vpc/value_profile resolve pattern that defined the shape.

non_scorable.reason: GENUINE low-enrichment, not a tool defect. The gate is a fixed-head contiguous 4-byte 'pop3' scheme literal at 0x06-0x09 — exactly operand_enrichment's sweet spot — and the tool RAN (n_scorable=1) yet signed_target_enrich fell below 1.0. The honest read: a scheme prefix is CORPUS-AMBIENT in curl (virtually every reaching seed in naive's corpus already carries some scheme at the head, including 'pop3'-family bytes), so naive_target_frac is high and the cmplog-vs-naive log2 ratio washes out. This is the very alternative the prediction is built to catch ('literal-is-corpus-ambient => enrich ~0'), so the negative is a VALID discriminating outcome, NOT evidence to lower the threshold. curl_505 stays inconclusive/rule_not_met under the unchanged rule (G3: an honest negative is the correct outcome). Sibling curl_297/468 enriched strongly precisely because their distinctive port/HTTP/authority literals are NOT corpus-ambient — the contrast confirms the rule is doing real work.

The I2S operand is a DUPLICATE 'IHDR' chunk-type appearing a SECOND time at a layout-dependent (variable) downstream offset, not a fixed head offset. operand_enrichment auto-derives its gate signature from W/L head-byte consensus; for a variable-position second-IHDR the consensus locks onto the incidental shared PNG-header prefix (the FIRST IHDR / signature bytes, identical in W and L) rather than the gate operand, so the scored offsets carry no I2S delta (target==decoy across arms => enrichment ~0). The mechanism is real (I2S manufacturing a duplicate chunk to set the PNG_HAVE_IHDR mode bit) but its footprint is a VARIABLE-OFFSET STRUCTURAL REPEAT, which no available descriptor can represent (byte_freq_ratio is fixed-offset; value_distance_reached needs a single fixed operand window). decidable:false by tool reach, NOT by mechanism doubt or off-server corpus.

Inequality gate `length != 32`: the WINNING value is 'any 4-byte value != 32', so there is NO single target literal byte for operand_enrichment's target/decoy model. The tool found a fixed-offset signature on the shared cHRM FOURCC (present in both W and L => target==decoy, enrichment ~0) and scored it rule_not_met, but that is the wrong gate. The actual length field is a variable big-endian integer with no consensus byte; value_distance_reached's numeric (magnitude-gap) mode is framed for a vp/vpc GRADIENT winner (winner_closer expects vp closest), whereas here vp is the BLOCKER and the win is an I2S step-substitution off the logged (length,32) operands, so its closure framing inverts and does not discriminate I2S-pro from VP-sufficiency. decidable:false by tool reach.

Single-byte equality `name[0] == ':'` (0x3a), but name[0] sits at a VARIABLE, DTD-scaffold-dependent position deep in the input (after <?xml ...><!DOCTYPE ...>), not at a fixed head offset. The W and L seeds share the identical DTD scaffold prefix, so the head-byte consensus locks onto scaffold bytes (target==decoy) and misses the deep, variable colon position. The operand is width-1, which is chance-alignment prone even if a sliding-window tool were applied. No available descriptor can pin a single-byte operand at a variable deep offset. decidable:false by tool reach.

tool_elimination_audit._doc: Round-2 requires honestly checking every NOT-yet-tried built tool against the 4 unlabeled branches before confirming decidable:false. Result: none discriminates a new mechanism here, because this shape's mechanism is cmplog-resolves-ALONE I2S substitution — which structurally excludes the joint / gradient / depth tools.
tool_elimination_audit.value_distance_reached: REJECTED. Tests the VP-gradient mechanism (winner climbs a Hamming/magnitude gradient CLOSE to the operand; its discriminator is that a pure-I2S alternative makes the loser cmplog land distance ~0 too). For this shape vp is the BLOCKER and the win is I2S substitution — its winner_closer framing inverts, so it cannot separate I2S-pro from VP-sufficiency for 3970/505. No new mechanism.
tool_elimination_audit.joint_necessity (struct_size_and_token_c: REJECTED. Tests vpc-needs-BOTH assembly depth (vpc builds a structure larger than I2S-only reaches). This shape has cmplog RESOLVING ALONE (W), so it is NOT joint-necessity — a 'vpc bigger than cmplog' prediction is false by construction. No mechanistic basis for any of the 4.
tool_elimination_audit.depth_reach: REJECTED. Tests the ctx/ngram ITERATION-DEPTH subtype (winner corpus drives a loop branch deeper per seed). The 4 branches are I2S-literal/structural gates, not ctx/ngram iteration loops; the standard cov binary has no per-context counters and the gate is reached-once, not iterated. No mechanistic basis.
tool_elimination_audit.conclusion: Every untried tool is mechanistically wrong for a cmplog-resolves-alone I2S shape. The mechanism for all 7 branches IS i2s_literal_operand_substitution; the 4 failures are a MEASURABILITY gap (gate-form vs operand_enrichment's fixed-offset model), not a different mechanism. Per G1 (a new hypothesis must be a genuinely different + discriminating mechanism) and G3 (honest inconclusive is correct), no new hypothesis is added.

data_realities_respected: I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op: no seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S event' descriptor proposed. operand_enrichment reads the standing CORPUS byte frequency, the feasible footprint of I2S literal placement.
value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK not a mutator and is invisible in mutation_op: the test never tries to observe a VP 'gradient event'; it relies on the cmplog-vs-naive corpus enrichment delta.

Cross-server honesty: libpng (3949,3970,4020) and libxml2 (6910) corpora ARE on-disk on server B and WERE scored there (assignments_sB.json: 4020 validated 14.664, the other three rule_not_met). The decidable:false verdicts are by TOOL REACH on the gate form, explicitly NOT by missing off-server corpus. Designs are valid for ALL branches; each owning server arbitrates its own targets.

joint/structural gates have different-sized W vs L seeds (byte-alignment fails) — irrelevant here since the validated members use fixed-offset byte_freq_ratio and the joint tools are rejected on mechanism grounds above.

notes.superset_freeze: The confirmed hypothesis i2s_literal_operand_substitution is carried forward UNCHANGED (label, descriptor, registry_tool=operand_enrichment, metrics, prediction, rule >= 1.0 all verbatim) so curl_297/curl_468/libpng_4020 re-validate. No relaxed-threshold re-test of any prior hypothesis was performed (forbidden).
notes.merge: Single hypothesis (collapsed 3 prior Pass-B clusters: i2s_fourcc_chunk_dispatch, i2s_exact_scalar_operand_substitution, i2s_url_structure_assembly). They split on byte_signature (contiguous FOURCC vs single-byte/derived scalar vs dispersed URL scaffold), but operand_enrichment's per_gate_offset metric scores all three identically when the operand is a FIXED-HEAD-OFFSET DISTINCTIVE literal — which is exactly the dividing line between the 3 it validated and the 4 it could not. No real-data measurement discriminates the byte_signature subtypes among the validated members, so they remain one hypothesis.
notes.round2_rationale: Re-examined each of the 4 rule_not_met branches against EVERY not-yet-tried built tool (tool_elimination_audit). The mechanism for all 7 is identical (I2S literal substitution); the 4 failures are 4 distinct GATE-FORM measurability limits, not 4 distinct mechanisms: (1) variable-offset structural repeat (libpng_3949 duplicate IHDR), (2) inequality with no target byte (libpng_3970 length!=32), (3) variable deep single-byte operand (libxml2_6910 deep DTD colon), (4) fixed-offset but corpus-ambient literal (curl_505 'pop3'). Three are decidable:false by tool reach; one is an honest discriminating negative. No genuinely-different discriminable mechanism exists for any of them, so no new hypothesis is added.
notes.threshold_integrity: Rule >= 1.0 held FIXED across all rounds. It validated 3 members inside the registry's validated pro band and correctly rejected 4 ill-fitting gates. Per G3 the 4 non-validated branches stay inconclusive (3 decidable:false + 1 honest rule_not_met) rather than being relabeled by widening the rule.
notes.what_data_could_not_discriminate: A variable-offset structural-repeat footprint, an inequality gate's any-value-but-K winning condition, and a single-byte operand at a variable deep position are all real I2S effects with NO descriptor in the current closed vocab that can represent them. A future descriptor (e.g. a structural-repeat detector, or an operand-window scan anchored on signature.operand_literal rather than head-consensus) could revisit 3949/6910; until built, decidable:false is the honest outcome.
